== Notes for [[Item:Q105012|Q105012]] ==

Inez de TAPIA Sosa24 was born (date unknown). Parents: Andres de TAPIA and Isabel de SOSA.

Spouse: Francisco de SOSA ALBORNOZ. Inez de TAPIA Sosa and Francisco de SOSA ALBORNOZ were married about 1560. Children were: Alonso de SOSA ALBORNOZ.

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b215.html#P1724

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000011233053645

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
